title: Dense_rank window function with filter
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.top_ranked_posts/0` that returns posts with a `dense_rank` by view_count descending, then filters to only those with `rank <= 5`. Use `dense_rank() |> over(order_by: [desc: p.view_count])` in an inner subquery, then `where: r.rank <= 5` in the outer. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Window function + subquery + filter by window result. Standard top-K pattern with dense_rank variant.
